# DEPRECATED: This crib was generated with a historically inaccurate Enigma
# implementation that uses simple linear stepping (no turnover notch).
# The correct implementation uses notch-based double-stepping, which diverges
# from simple stepping when a rotor's notch position is reached mid-message.
# Verified: TURING (6 chars) matches, but WEDIDIT (7 chars) diverges at step 7
# because Rotor I notch at Q is triggered for the 7th character.
#
# Use bombe_pc.toml (generated by cli/generate_crib) for correct test data.
TURING,HWJHKF
ENIGMAISAMACHINE,UBPPVOUWMBOTFRDL
PROCESSISFAULT,VCMAYYCOPSOQGK
WEDIDIT,GXEHCWX
ADDITIONALMSG,JFEHWWLUMIEVL
